title: Special taxes excepted
doc_html:
§2802.  Special taxes excepted

Taxes authorized in R.S. 33:2801 shall be exclusive of and in addition to taxes levied in pursuance of special elections held by authority of law relating to special taxes.
doc_text:
§2802.  Special taxes excepted
Taxes authorized in R.S. 33:2801 shall be exclusive of and in addition to taxes levied in pursuance of special elections held by authority of law relating to special taxes.
